narrative:
12 congressional district has 531,435 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.4 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -5.9% D−R vs -22.7% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
